creator: deuerl@bugsy.indra.de
text:
when trying to make an aout-to-elf-build with kerberosIV support enabled  in
/etc/make.conf you get an error when elf-ld tries to link the libs
/usr/obj/src/aout/...elf/ld /usr/obj/src/elf/lib/libkrb. ..

Fix: 

sorry :-(
How-To-Repeat: 
enable kerberosiV-support and try to make an aout-to-elf-build ;)
